_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
specialty: Urology, Pediatric Surgery, Plastic & Reconstructive Surgery
clinical_indications: Opening of the urethra at a location other than the tip of the penis
Hooded appearance of the penis because only the top half of the penis is covered by foreskin
Hypospadias is usually a condition present at birth in which Surgery is typically recommended between the first 6 months to 2 years after birth.

preauth.label: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure and planned line of treatment

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical notes including evaluation findings and planned line of treatment submitted?
Was the Cystoscopy/Urethrogram report (If applicable) submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details available?
Detailed operative notes with indications and outcomes of the procedure submitted?
Detailed discharge summary with the date of the follow-up mentioned?
Did physical examination detect structural abnormalities or ventral penile curvature?

common_queries: Clinical notes missing evaluation findings, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure, or planned line of treatment.
Cystoscopy/Urethrogram report not submitted when applicable.
Physical examination did not detect structural abnormalities or ventral penile curvature despite claim.
Detailed indoor case papers with daily vitals or treatment details not available.
Detailed operative notes lacking indications, outcomes, or full procedure details.
Discharge summary missing the date of follow-up.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MCh / DNB equivalent in (Urology, Pediatric surgery, Plastic surgery)
clinical_key_pointers: Main goals is to build a new Urethra
Build a new opening at the tip of the penis
This procedure require follow-up surgeries, sometimes soon after the first surgery, in other instances many years or decades later.
